samples.text:
Once upon a time, there was a little girl named Lily. She loved to play outside in the park with her friends. One day, while playing, she found a big, scary monster appeared. The monster was scared and didn't know what to do.
Lily's mom saw that it was okay and they were not scared anymore. They told her that it's important to be careful when we try to catch things. So, they decided to take turns and have fun together. When they got home, Lily felt happy that she could help her mom.
From that day on, Lily learned that sometimes things can be dangerous, but it's important to always try new things. And whenever she tried to make sure if something may seems happen, you can still be very sad.

Once upon a time, there was a little boy named Timmy. He loved to play with his toys and run around outside. One day, he went to the park to play with his friends. They played in the park

Lily and Tim went to. He saw a big, red ball near the pond. The ball was very high and had many colors.
"Wow, Tim! You are so good!" said the ball. "I like to play with you, Tim."
Tim and Tim played together all day. They had fun. But then, something unexpected happened. The ball started to move! It rolled down the hill and Tim could not get the ball back. Tim and Tim were sad. They did not want to lose the ball anymore.

The cat and the cat became best friends. They played together every day. And they lived happily ever after.
